prompts.scene: Your Brain Was Built to Follow
prompts.narration_snippet: Long before humans had language
prompts.prompt: The scene is rendered in a vibrant, high-quality comic book style characterized by bold, clean ink outlines and a rich, cel-shaded color palette like CHIBI style that brings the whimsical world to life. A vast primordial savanna stretches beneath a golden dawn sky, with tall amber grasses swaying in the wind and a distant volcanic mountain smoking on the horizon. The small, pudgy, bipedal humanoid with smooth, pale white skin—tinted with a pearlescent lavender sheen in the shadows—stands wrapped in a rough-hewn fur cloak among a small tribe of similar but slightly varied chibi creatures, all wearing primitive garments. Its massive, teal-green crystalline eyes sparkle with a starry, magical gradient, scanning the horizon with primal alertness. Delicate purple eyebrows are set with quiet vigilance. Its teal plush backpack, complete with silver moon-and-star embroidery, shimmering silver buckles, and a tiny jewel charm, peeks out from beneath the fur cloak. Warm golden light bathes the entire scene. no text
